task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the Simple Filters module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Simple Filters' module is visible in the module panel or selected in the module dropdown.
The 'Filter' dropdown in Simple Filters shows 'DiscreteGaussianImageFilter' or 'SmoothingRecursiveGaussianImageFilter'.

task_completion.description: Set Input to MRHead and Output to a new volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Input Volume' is set to 'MRHead' and 'Output Volume' is set to 'MRHead_smoothed' (or a similar name indicating a new volume).

task_completion.description: Set the Sigma or Variance parameter to approximately 2.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sigma' or 'Variance' parameter input field displays a value of approximately '2.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new smoothed volume has been created
task_completion.visual_evidence: A volume named 'MRHead_smoothed' appears in the Data module list, Subject Hierarchy, or the slice view controller dropdowns.

task_completion.description: Confirm the smoothing effect in the slice views
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image displayed in the Red, Yellow, or Green slice views corresponds to the smoothed volume and appears visibly blurrier (less grain/noise) than the sharp original MRI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Simple Filters module panel (e.g., dropdowns, buttons) rather than purely scripting in the Python console.

integrity.description: Verify the task is performed within 3D Slicer
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard 3D Slicer application layout (module panel on left, slice views on right).

integrity.description: Ensure results are generated during the session
integrity.visual_evidence: The output volume appears in the scene after the 'Apply' button is clicked or the filter is executed, not loaded from an external file immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filter type is 'DiscreteGaussianImageFilter' or 'SmoothingRecursiveGaussianImageFilter'. The expected Sigma/Variance parameter is 2.0. The input volume is 'MRHead'. The output volume should be named 'MRHead_smoothed'. Visually, the output volume must look blurrier (smoothed) compared to the original MRHead volume.
